items.title: Wayanad debris slip: search intensified for lone missing project manager
items.summary: ​Mr. Rana, a project manager from Himachal Pradesh, remains unaccounted for after a massive debris slide struck the under-construction Wayanad twin-tunnel road project at Kalladi
